review_criteria: Verify the amendment explicitly introduces a YAML-based DAG workflow parsing engine, replacing the hardcoded 6-stage lifecycle.
Verify the amendment explicitly adds the LLM Router to dynamically select workflows.
Verify the amendment requires porting Archon's 17 default workflows and adapting them to our heterogeneous JSON Contract (L2/L3) federation model.
Verify the amendment adds support for custom YAML workflow authoring.
Verify the revised milestone map (tasks/v0.8-milestone-map-v2.md) reflects the integration of the YAML engine, LLM Router, and the 17 built-in workflows into the M1-M6 sequence.
Verify NO implementation code (e.g., modifying src/mcp-server/src/index.ts) or active state model semantic changes (modifying workflow/dispatch.json) occurred during this kickoff amendment phase.
